name: icon-foundry
description: Foundry VTT system for the ICON TTRPG

scripts.pack: for pack in abilities jobs bonds conditions; do npx fvtt package pack --id icon --type System -n $pack --in src/packs/$pack --out packs; done
scripts.unpack: for pack in abilities jobs bonds conditions; do npx fvtt package unpack --id icon --type System -n $pack --in packs/$pack --out src/packs/$pack; done
